data.body: MILESTONE: E3 (def5) PASSED round-9 (signed d5ec73bc=HEAD). ALL THREE non-entangled experiment plans now review-clean + signed: E2(d125)✓ E6(a880)✓ E3(def5)✓ — claimable. E5(5342) deferred (co-design w/ R5). PLAN-REVIEW FOUNDATION COMPLETE for the experiments. Held: eval-RUN phase (claim+implement harnesses+run) awaits operator direction (posted needs-input) given (a) flaky main CI blocks ALL landing after 6 rechecks — needs maintainer fix, (b) run phase = large multi-session LLM spend. R7(#761) fully green stacked on R6(#760, 6x flaky Verified-1). Resume plan in prior handoff entry.
